allow: Bash(which wkhtmltopdf; which weasyprint; pandoc --list-output-formats | grep -E "pdf|html")
Bash(pandoc --list-input-formats | head -5; latex --version 2>/dev/null | head -1; pdflatex --version 2>/dev/null | head -1)

Bash(cd /Users/cruzlara5/Documents/plant_recognizer/docs && pandoc classifier_documentation.md \\
  -o classifier_documentation.pdf \\
  --pdf-engine=pdflatex \\
  -V geometry:margin=2.5cm \\
  -V fontsize=11pt \\
  -V documentclass=article \\
  -V mainfont="DejaVu Serif" \\
  -V monofont="DejaVu Sans Mono" \\
  -V colorlinks=true \\
  -V linkcolor=blue \\
  --highlight-style=tango \\
  2>&1)

Bash(cd /Users/cruzlara5/Documents/plant_recognizer/docs && pandoc classifier_documentation.md \\
  -o classifier_documentation.pdf \\
  --pdf-engine=xelatex \\
  -V geometry:margin=2.5cm \\
  -V fontsize=11pt \\
  -V documentclass=article \\
  -V colorlinks=true \\
  -V linkcolor=blue \\
  --syntax-highlighting=tango \\
  2>&1)

Bash(pandoc classifier_documentation.md \\
  -o classifier_documentation.pdf \\
  --pdf-engine=xelatex \\
  -V geometry:margin=2.5cm \\
  -V fontsize=11pt \\
  -V documentclass=article \\
  -V colorlinks=true \\
  -V linkcolor=blue \\
  -V monofont="DejaVuSansM Nerd Font Mono" \\
  --syntax-highlighting=tango \\
  2>&1 | grep -v "Missing character")
